cart.title: Your cart
cart.emptyBody: Browse products and add items to get started.
cart.emptyTrustEscrow: Online payment is held by Vergeo5 until delivery confirmation.
cart.emptyTrustDelivery: Lusaka delivery zones are confirmed at checkout before you pay.
cart.emptyTrustPickup: Nationwide pickup remains available when delivery is not.
cart.updateError: Could not update quantity. Reverted to the last saved amount.
cart.addError: Could not add to cart. Please try again.
cart.deliveryEligible: Vendor subtotal qualifies for free Lusaka delivery — zone confirmed at checkout
cart.deliveryHint: Add {amount} more from this vendor toward free Lusaka delivery
cart.deliveryThreshold: Free Lusaka delivery from {threshold} per vendor
cart.deliveryScopeNote: Applies inside Lusaka delivery zones only. Outside Lusaka, pickup is available. Zone fees still apply below the threshold.
cart.freeDeliveryUnlocked: This vendor subtotal qualifies for free Lusaka delivery
cart.noticeOutOfStock: This item is now out of stock
cart.loadErrorBody: Check your connection and try again. Your items are not lost.
cart.multiSellerNote: Items from different sellers may have different delivery or pickup options. Each seller is checked out with its own fulfilment choice.
cart.escrowTeaser: When you pay online, Vergeo5 holds your money until delivery — then releases it to the seller.
cart.stockUnavailableNotice: An item is no longer available. Review your cart before continuing to checkout.

contact.title: Your contact details
contact.subtitle: We'll use this to send order updates on WhatsApp or SMS.
contact.phoneHelp: MTN, Airtel, or Zamtel — we'll send a one-time code.
contact.invalidPhone: Enter a valid Zambian mobile number
contact.sendFailed: Could not send the code. Try again.
contact.expired: Code expired — request a new one

fulfilment.title: How should we deliver?
fulfilment.subtitle: Choose delivery or pickup for each seller.
fulfilment.landmarkPlaceholder: e.g. Woodlands Stage 2, near the church
fulfilment.landmarkHelp: Describe where you are — we'll match a delivery zone.
fulfilment.outsideZone: Outside Lusaka delivery — pickup only for this address
fulfilment.mixedHint: You can mix delivery and pickup across sellers.

checkout.reservationExpired: Your reservation expired — items were returned to your cart.
checkout.stockUnavailable: An item is no longer available. Check your cart.

payment.title: How would you like to pay?
payment.subtitle: Your payment is held securely until delivery.
payment.payerHelp: The number that will receive the USSD payment prompt.
payment.cardExplainer: After you place your order, you'll complete card payment on Lenco's secure hosted page. Vergeo5 never sees your card details.
payment.codIneligible: Cash on delivery is only available for orders up to {cap}.
payment.invalidPayer: Enter a valid Zambian mobile number
payment.codRejected: Cash on delivery is not available for this order total
payment.railRejected: That mobile money network is not supported
payment.error: Could not save your payment method. Try again.
payment.paymentsDisabled: Online payment is temporarily unavailable. Please use Cash on Delivery where available, or try again shortly.
payment.momoHelp: Approve a USSD prompt on your phone. Funds are held by Vergeo5 until delivery.
payment.cardHelp: Pay on Lenco’s secure page. Vergeo5 never sees your card details.
payment.codHelp: Pay cash to the courier on delivery for eligible orders.

review.title: Review your order
review.subtitle: Check everything looks right before you pay.
review.consentLabel: I agree to the Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy
review.consentRequired: Accept the Terms & Conditions to continue
review.placeOrderUnavailable: Order placement is temporarily unavailable. Your payment method is saved — try again shortly or contact support if this continues.
review.nextMomo: You’ll get a USSD prompt on your phone. Approve it to start payment — the order is not confirmed until we verify approval.
review.nextCard: You’ll continue on Lenco’s secure page. Do not close that page until payment finishes.
review.nextCod: Your order is placed for cash on delivery. Pay the courier when the order arrives — online payment is not taken now.

pending.error: Could not load payment status. Try again.
pending.confirmingBody: We received a payment signal and are confirming your order. This is not a final paid confirmation yet — check your order status for escrow updates.
pending.codBody: Have {amount} ready in cash when your order arrives. Our courier will collect payment at delivery.
pending.cancelledBody: You declined the mobile money prompt. You can try again or choose a different payment method at checkout.
pending.timeoutBody: The USSD prompt expired before approval. Check your phone has network signal, then retry — we will send a fresh prompt for the same order.
pending.retryError: Could not retry payment. Check your connection and try again.

ussd.title: Check your phone
ussd.subtitle: Approve the {amount} prompt on your phone to complete payment.
ussd.mtnHelp: Open the MTN MoMo prompt on your phone and enter your PIN to approve {amount}.
ussd.airtelHelp: Open the Airtel Money prompt on your phone and enter your PIN to approve {amount}.
ussd.genericHelp: A mobile money prompt was sent to your phone. Enter your PIN to approve {amount}.
ussd.doNotClose: Keep this page open while you approve on your phone.

card.subtitle: Complete your payment securely on Lenco. Vergeo5 never sees your card details.
card.successBody: Your order is confirmed and payment is held by Vergeo5. You can view your order details now.
card.failedBody: The card payment did not go through. You can try again from checkout.
card.heldBody: We could not verify this payment automatically. Our team has been alerted — do not pay again until we confirm.
card.pendingBody: We are waiting for final confirmation from Lenco. This page will update shortly.
card.widgetUnavailable: Card payments are temporarily unavailable. Try mobile money or try again later.
card.secureNote: Secured by Lenco — PCI compliant hosted checkout
